mapper.sql: r.id, r.review_type, r.company_id, CASE r.company_id WHEN 9999 THEN '세모통' ELSE GET_COMPANY_NM(r.company_id) END AS companyName, r.content, r.score, r.display_yn, r.manage_id, IFNULL(c.user_name, '') AS adminName, r.manage_memo, r.plan_id, p.plan_name, r.create_date, r.create_id, b.username, r.modified_date, r.modified_id

where.if: AND r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_csm_semotong_review r LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list p ON r.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user b ON r.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON r.modified_id = c.id

SELECT
FROM tb_csm_semotong_review r LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list p ON r.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user b ON r.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON r.modified_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{searchId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_csm_semotong_review (review_type, content, score, display_yn, manage_id, manage_memo, create_id, plan_id) VALUES( #{reviewType}, #{content}, #{score}, #{displayYn}, #{manageId}, #{manageMemo}, #{createId}, #{planId} );
